subtopics.subtopicName: Structure and calculation: integers, primes, factors, multiples, powers, roots, standard form, indices
Fractions, decimals and percentages: conversions, calculations, recurring decimals
Measures and accuracy: rounding, estimation, bounds, calculator methods, standard units
Notation, vocabulary and manipulation: algebraic expressions, substitution, expansion, factorisation, simplification
Graphs: linear, quadratic, cubic, reciprocal, exponential, trigonometric, circle; gradient of graphs
Solving equations and inequalities: linear, quadratic, simultaneous, rearranging formulae, iterative methods
Sequences: nth term, linear and quadratic sequences, Fibonacci-style sequences

topics.topicName: Ratio, Proportion and Rates of Change

subtopics.subtopicName: Ratio and proportion: dividing amounts, best buys, scales, maps, recipe problems
Fractional and percentage change, simple and compound interest, depreciation
Direct and inverse proportion, algebraic proportion problems, graphs of proportion
Rates of change: speed, density, pressure, gradient as rate of change
Properties and constructions: angles, polygons, bearings, constructions, loci, circle theorems
Mensuration and calculation: perimeter, area, volume, surface area, Pythagoras, trigonometry, compound measures
Higher topics: vectors, similarity, congruence, 3D trigonometry
Probability scale, theoretical and experimental probability, relative frequency
Mutually exclusive and independent events, tree diagrams, Venn diagrams, sample space diagrams
Conditional probability (Higher tier)
Sampling, data collection, questionnaires and bias
Data presentation: tables, charts, histograms, cumulative frequency, box plots
Measures of central tendency and spread: mean, median, mode, range, quartiles, interquartile range
Scatter graphs, correlation, lines of best fit
